locator.quote: net the same profit after commission

text: Equal-profit sizing balances the lay stake so both race outcomes net the same profit after commission.

locator.quote: equalise net profit on both race outcomes after commission

text: Equal-profit sizing balances the lay stake so both race outcomes net the same profit after commission.
Switching to equal-profit sizing is a reward-scale change: scalping_locked_pnl magnitudes shift upward, so post-fix vs pre-fix rows compare on raw_pnl_reward.
